name: bci-tracker
description: Brain-Computer Interface academic paper and news tracker

scripts.verify: node -c server.js && node -c middleware/auth.js && node -c routes/auth.js && node -c routes/api.js && node -c services/auth.js && node -c services/ai_json.js && node -c services/fetcher.js && node -c services/import.js && node -c services/deepseek.js && node -c gemini.js && node -c public/app.js && node -c scripts/export_external_events.js && node -c scripts/prepare_matching_context.js && node -c scripts/run_smoke_with_server.js && node -c scripts/test_collection_rules.js && node -c scripts/test_external_event_dedupe.js && node -c scripts/test_import_security.js && node -c scripts/test_deepseek_json.js && node -c scripts/test_gemini_route_contract.js && node -c scripts/test_matching_context.js && node -c scripts/validate_api_docs.js && node scripts/test_collection_rules.js && node scripts/test_external_event_dedupe.js && node scripts/test_import_security.js && node scripts/test_deepseek_json.js && node scripts/test_gemini_route_contract.js && node scripts/test_matching_context.js && node scripts/validate_api_docs.js && node scripts/run_smoke_with_server.js
scripts.validate:v2-local: npm run validate:events -- external_events/_example.json && npm run validate:knowledge
